news.title: The Humanoid Next Door: Reachy the Robot Bridges the Uncanny Valley at Michigan Tech
news.summary_en: In Michigan Tech's Human-Robot Interaction Lab, Huskies teach the lab's newest occupant the basics: how to wave, glide and hold a steady grip. Guided by their faculty mentor, they're on a mission to make advanced robotics more accessible.  Inside Michael  . . .
